programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
13/52. Tha Meanbh is Beag ri miastadh 's tha seabhal Granaidh ga mhilleadh. Meanbh and Beag are up to no good and Granny's shawl gets ruined.
2/10. Linda visits Meaban and Moo with a challenge. Today, they must find shiny silver things.
5/21. Phoenix eagerly joins in some Puffin Practice with Oona, Isabelle and Baba. Tha Phoenix, gun dàil a' gabhail pàirt ann am Practas nam Buthaid,còmhla ri Oona, Iseabail is Baba.
6/21. Oona and Baba go to the Secret Den to shelter from a thunderstorm. Tha Oona is Baba a' dol dhan t-Sadhbhaidh Dhìomhair gus fasgadh a ghabhail bhon stoirm.
10/26. Petit is tired of his little sister and decides that he will be an only child again.
13/26. Seal organises a swimming contest in the lake. Owl decides to sign up.
43/80. Michael Hill reads An t-Ailbhean Croiseil, written by David Walliams, illustrated by Tony Ross and translated into Gaelic by Jo Macdonald.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 43/52. Tha oidhche spà dol a bhith ann. A spa night is going to take place.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 44/52. Tha Mrs Kaufmann a' buinnig duais ach chan eil fhios cò a thabhainn i. Mrs Kaufmann wins a prize, but no-one knows who donated it!
6/9. At four months old, conjoined twins Hussan and Hussein underwent an operation to separate them. Now they take up a climbing challenge.
1/52. Tha Belle is Sebastian a' dol air cuairt-dànachd gus an dràgon geal a lorg. Belle and Sebastian go on an adventure to find the white dragon.
14/20. Never meet your Heroes. The Farmers Rock 'n' Roll idol is stranded at the farm when his limousine breaks down. Soon revealed as a spoilt pretender, Shaun decides to show him a lesson.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
1/12. Tha Abigail a' toirt dà rud math còmhla agus a' dèanamh Cruffins. Abigail makes a hybrid, cruffins!
7/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
7/8. Ramsay follows in Scottish legend Rob Roy's footsteps in Stirlingshire's hills and glens. Ramsay an tòir air Rob Ruadh MacGriogair a measg nam beann san gleann sna Trosachan.
5/6. Peter expands his crofting skill set as he learns how to build fences and make hay. Tha sgilean chruitearachd Phàdruig a' fàs 's e 'g ionnsachadh mu fheansaireachd is spealan.
Go behind the scenes with Niteworks as they record their third studio album. Contains some strong language.
1/4. The capercaillie's story begins in the far north as biologists capture wild animals in central Sweden to take to Germany's Niederlausitz Natural Park.
4/6. Featuring performances from the acclaimed Gary Sutherland Ceilidh Band, recorded at the Trad Awards 2021. With Gary and his first class band performing a lively set of jigs.
4/4. Mary Ann Kennedy presents a music show from Celtic Connections 2026, featuring Mary Frances, Heidi Talbot, Boubacar Samaké, Maggie MacInnes and Michael McGovern.

37/52. Tha MacÌomhair a' saoilsinn gum bi e na dheagh ghàirnealair ach tha e cho ceàrr sa ghabhas! MacÌomhair thinks that he will be a great gardener, but that is very much not the case!
5/26. The mice are preparing for their annual ball, which Célestine has been invited to for the first time.
12/52. Tha tubaist aig Uircean 's tha Pip a' cur plàstair air a gualainn goirt. Uircean has an accident and Pip puts a plaster on her sore shoulder.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 33/52. Abney, Teal and Neep make mysterious noises on a misty day. They try to get Bop to join in the game, but it's not so mysterious down by the lake.
13/26. Seal organises a swimming contest in the lake. Owl decides to sign up.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
...Inverness Caledonian Thistle. Live League One football action as Stenhousemuir host Inverness CT.
1/6. Archive music series featuring choirs and outstanding soloists. This episode features The London Gaelic Choir.
8/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.

programmes.show_name: Immigration Tracks - Canada, le Anne NicAilpein
programmes.show_description: 2/7. The journey continues to Nova Scotia via a vineyard on the edge of the Bras d'Or Lake.

programmes.show_name: Cuirm@Celtic Connections: Niteworks & The BBC SSO
programmes.show_description: 1/3. Niteworks and The BBC SSO collaborate in a performance at Glasgow Royal Concert Hall.
2/4. A look at the golden jackal - a shy predator, whose territory used to be in the Balkans.
1/2. Hoolie 2023. A' dèanamh moladh air Runrig. Le Mànran, Wolfstone, Trail West agus aoighean. Hoolie 2023 celebrates Runrig. Music from Mànran, Wolfstone, Trail West and guests.
